---
title: empty-lines
description: "Detect edge blank lines in blocks."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Detect edge blank lines in blocks. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func run() {

	start()

}
```

## Good

```go
func run() {
	start()
}
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only empty-lines`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
